sections.Description:
The jellyfish-like Psions act as support units, providing passive bonuses to theVek. The Soldier Psion is distinguished by its pale blue coloration and bright green cranial nodes. This Psion provides a health bonus to all other Vek units on the field.
UnderPsionic Receiver, all of the players Mechs will gain an additional +1 HP while the Solider Psion is alive.
sections.Strategy:
The Soldier Psion can make even frail enemies likeHornetsmore sturdy, and allows the sturdiest Alphas survive 5 damage attacks. That said, the amount of experience earned from killing all non-Minor enemies is increased by 1 while the Solider Psion is alive, so look for missions that have instant-kill effects — such asDestroy the DamorCataclysm— if you want to give your pilots more experience per enemy.
Killing a Soldier Psion results in the immediate reduction of the maximum and current health of all Vek on the map by 1 HP. This reduction will immediately kill any Vek that were at 1 HP before the Psion was killed. However, the reduction in maximum HP happens before the Vek dies meaning that a Vek is worth their original XP amount. For example, a 2 HP Vek like a Burrower that has 3 HP when a Soldier Psion is present, is worth 2 XP when the Soldier Vek is killed.

Description
[
]
The jellyfish-like Psions act as support units, providing passive bonuses to the
Vek
. The Soldier Psion is distinguished by its pale blue coloration and bright green cranial nodes. This Psion provides a health bonus to all other Vek units on the field.
Under
Psionic Receiver
, all of the players Mechs will gain an additional +1 HP while the Solider Psion is alive.
Strategy
[
]
The Soldier Psion can make even frail enemies like
Hornets
more sturdy, and allows the sturdiest Alphas survive 5 damage attacks. That said, the amount of experience earned from killing all non-Minor enemies is increased by 1 while the Solider Psion is alive, so look for missions that have instant-kill effects — such as
Destroy the Dam
or
Cataclysm
— if you want to give your pilots more experience per enemy.
Killing a Soldier Psion results in the immediate reduction of the maximum and current health of all Vek on the map by 1 HP. This reduction will immediately kill any Vek that were at 1 HP before the Psion was killed. However, the reduction in maximum HP happens before the Vek dies meaning that a Vek is worth their original XP amount. For example, a 2 HP Vek like a Burrower that has 3 HP when a Soldier Psion is present, is worth 2 XP when the Soldier Vek is killed.
